content: Verify AWS creds: list S3, describe Cognito user pool, check app client config
Install boto3 + python-jose; add AWS env vars; write aws_clients.py
Cognito auth: signup (admin_create_user + auto-confirm), login (USER_PASSWORD_AUTH), token validation via JWKS
Wire Cognito on backend; keep demo bypass; update auth dependency
S3: upload syllabi/study material to bucket gryph-os; replace /tmp; add presigned download
Phase 3: Vapi webhook /api/webhooks/vapi + Gemini transcript scoring; display results in Call Center
Phase 4: In-app scheduler (CallSchedule model + background loop) + UI date/time picker
Frontend updates: AWS-powered badges, results panel, schedule UI
